headline: Assessing Sempra (SRE) Valuation As Investors Revisit The Stock After Recent Share Price Moves
summary: Why Sempra stock is drawing fresh attention Sempra (SRE) is back on many investors’ radars after recent share price moves, with the stock closing at $91.57 and showing mixed return patterns over the past month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Sempra. While the recent 7-day share price return of a 3.73% decline and the 30-day share price return of a 7.0% decline suggest fading near-term momentum, the 1-year total shareholder return of 24.54% highlights a stronger longer-term...
